3205180.name: Silhou
3205180.description:
In Silhou, you play as a shadowy figure navigating treacherous platforming levels filled with deadly traps. The objective is to reach the exit door by collecting the key. Every level presents new challenges, with over 60 meticulously designed stages spread across five distinct worlds. As you progress, each world introduces increasingly dangerous traps to test your skills.


Silhou also features three optional challenges for each stage:

No Deaths - Complete the level without dying.
All Gems - Collect all gems in the level.
Perfect Run - Collect all gems and complete the level without dying.


Whether you're aiming for a perfect run or just trying to survive, Silhou demands precision, speed, and mastery to survive.
